## Summary

Describe the change clearly and concisely.

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated documentation for any changed behavior, schema meaning, or workflow expectations.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, credentials, tokens, or private keys.
- [ ] I did not print raw `DATABASE_URL` or other sensitive connection strings.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where practical.
- [ ] I noted whether this affects SQL, ingestion, security, API, or app behavior.
- [ ] I linked related issues or milestones.

## Change Type

- [ ] SQL / schema
- [ ] Python / app layer
- [ ] Ingestion
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] GitHub / CI

## Validation

Describe how this was validated.

## Risks

Note any migration, rollout, data-quality, or security risks.
